channel.title: Blog on XhstormR
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on XhstormR

item.title: Blog Changelog
item.description: 我把我对本博客的一些更新整理在这里，以便查阅。 后来因为太懒，就不整理了。😃 Highlight <link rel="stylesheet" href="http://apps.bdimg.com/libs/highlight.js/9.1.0/styles/monokai_sublime.min.css"> <script src="http://apps.bdimg.com/libs/highlight.js/9.1.0/highlight.min.js"></script> <script>hljs.initHighlightingOnLoad();</script> Scrollbar : : -webkit-scrollbar-track-piece { background-color: #FFFFFF; } : : -webkit-scrollbar-track-piece: horizontal { background-color: #23241f; } : : -webkit-scrollbar { height: 12px; width: 9px; } : : -webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #969CBD; } Font *: not([class*="icon"]): not(i) { font-family: "Microsoft YaHei","Symbol" !important; } Particle <canvas id="reactive-bg-canvas"></canvas> <script src="http://apps.bdimg.com/libs/jquery/2.1.4/jquery.min.js"></script> <script src="http://cdn.bootcss.com/gsap/1.18.2/TweenLite.min.js"></script> <script src="magic-canvas.min.js"></script> <script>$.magicCanvas.draw({type:"random-move",rgb:function (circlePos) {var px = circlePos.x;var py = circlePos.y;return {r:0,g:0,b:0};}})</script> Scroll Mouse function scrollPlus() { function e() { return m ?
